channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Cape Verde's remarkable 2026 World Cup debut and the future of its diaspora-powered team
item.description: Cape Verde, a small West African island nation with a population of just over half a million, made an impressive debut at the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Ranked 67th in the world, the Blue Sharks advanced fr...

item.title: Mariners extend Seattle's scoreless streak with 4-0 win over Blue Jays
item.description: The Seattle Mariners secured a 4-0 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, extending their scoreless streak to 24 innings. Emerson Hancock (6-4) pitched seven shutout innings, allowing just two hits and t...

item.title: Thunderstorms threaten kick-off as England prepare to face Mexico in World Cup last-16 tie
item.description: Severe thunderstorms in Mexico City dominated the build-up to England's World Cup last-16 match against Mexico at the Azteca Stadium, raising concerns that the scheduled kick-off could be delayed. Loc...

item.title: Big Bear bald eagle parents returned to their nest after Fourth of July fireworks, with eaglets remaining safe
item.description: Jackie and Shadow, the well-known bald eagle pair that nest near Big Bear Lake in California, temporarily left their nesting area during the local Fourth of July fireworks display but returned the fol...

item.title: Sindh Minister Addresses HIV Outbreak at Valika Hospital
item.description: Sindh Labour Minister Saeed Ghani confirmed that at least 78 children were infected with HIV/AIDS at Kulsoom Bai Valika Hospital, a facility under the Sindh Employees’ Social Security Institution (SES...

item.title: Naomi Osaka defeats Aryna Sabalenka in Wimbledon quarterfinals
item.description: Naomi Osaka delivered a major upset at Wimbledon by defeating top-seeded Aryna Sabalenka in the quarterfinals, sending the Belarusian world number one packing. The match, which took place on July 6, 2...

item.title: Swae Lee Performs at 2026 Hollywoodbets Durban July
item.description: Grammy-nominated American artist Swae Lee captivated thousands at the 2026 Hollywoodbets Durban July, delivering a high-energy performance that highlighted his status as a global hitmaker. Returning t...

item.title: Senate convenes impeachment court for Vice President Sara Duterte as trial begins amid heightened security
item.description: The Philippine Senate officially convened as an impeachment court on July 6, 2026, marking the start of the impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte. The proceedings are set to determine wheth...

item.title: Trump, Zelenskyy and NATO allies prepare for high-stakes summit amid divisions over Ukraine, defence spending and Iran
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump is scheduled to meet Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy during a NATO summit in Turkey, where alliance members are expected to confront significant disagreements over ...

item.title: england advances in world cup 2026 after defeating mexico
item.description: in a thrilling world cup 2026 last-16 clash at azteca stadium, england secured a 2-1 victory over mexico after a dramatic 90-minute encounter. jude bellingham's quick-fire brace within the first 10 mi...

item.title: Australia secure Women’s T20 World Cup as new generation continues winning tradition
item.description: Australia’s women’s cricket team has added another major trophy to its remarkable collection, winning the Women’s T20 World Cup at Lord’s and reinforcing its long-standing dominance in global cricket....

item.title: COA denies Efraim Genuino’s claim for congressional salary after ruling he never served as Laguna representative
item.description: The Commission on Audit (COA) denied the claim of former Philippine Amusement and Gaming Corporation (Pagcor) chairman Efraim Genuino for more than P10.3 million in salaries and benefits covering the ...

item.title: Russian Missile Strikes Kill Dozens in Kyiv Ahead of NATO Summit
item.description: Ukraine's capital Kyiv faced a devastating Russian attack on July 6, 2026, with ballistic missiles and drones striking the city center and trapping residents in damaged buildings. At least seven peopl...

item.title: Trump says he rejected recommendation to cancel July Fourth National Mall celebration despite severe weather concerns
item.description: President Donald Trump said he personally decided not to cancel the July Fourth 'Salute to America' celebration on the National Mall after advisers reportedly recommended calling off the event because...

item.title: England Face Mexico in FIFA World Cup 2026 Round of 16 at Azteca Stadium, Match Delayed Due to Thunderstorm
item.description: The highly anticipated Round of 16 clash between England and Mexico in the FIFA World Cup 2026 took place at the iconic Azteca Stadium in Mexico City. The match, originally scheduled for 6 pm local ti...

item.title: Springboks' dominant win over England highlights squad depth, Bomb Squad impact and improved discipline
item.description: The Springboks opened their Nations Championship campaign with an emphatic 45-21 victory over England at Ellis Park, extending their winning streak over the English side to five consecutive Tests. Des...

item.title: Chris Gotterup wins John Deere Classic with strong final round
item.description: Chris Gotterup secured his fourth PGA Tour title in 12 months by winning the John Deere Classic with a nine-under 62 in the final round. The victory came after Ben Kohles, attempting his first win in ...

item.title: FIFA suspends red card ban for Balogun after Trump intervention in World Cup clash
item.description: FIFA has suspended the automatic red card ban for US striker Folarin Balogun, allowing him to face Belgium in the World Cup last-16 clash. The decision followed a personal intervention by US President...

item.title: VHP President Alok Kumar Addresses Ram Temple Donation Controversy and Calls for Accountability
item.description: VHP International president Alok Kumar addressed the Ram Mandir donation controversy, rejecting links to the VHP, RSS, or the Centre. He emphasized the emotional impact on devotees and called for a co...

item.title: South Africa court upholds citizenship rights of foreign spouse despite Home Affairs non-compliance
item.description: The North Gauteng High Court in Pretoria has rejected an application from the Minister of Home Affairs to overturn a previous ruling that granted Mikhail Sakharov, a foreign national married to a Sout...
